Sep 26, 2006 Final Cut Pro ------------- Final Cut Pro is a video editing program from Apple. It is installed on the Macs in 349 Soda. Users are prompted to select a scratch space the first time they start Final Cut Pro, and they c

first time they start Final Cut Pro, and they can edit that later from the FCP System Preferences menu. You should select the "macosusers" disk and create a new folder on it that has the same name as your user name. The scratch space ne

me name as your user name. The scratch space needs to be on a local disk and not a network disk like your home directory. This is to for faster response times and to avoid filling the disk quota if your UNIX home directory. For informat

quota if your UNIX home directory. For information about other multimedia resources in Instructional labs, please see /share/b/pub/multimedia.help. Please report problems to inst@eecs.berkeley.edu. Instructional Support Group 37
